slices.title: Add note CRUD controls to existing mockup
slices.jtbd: When reviewing the note search interface, I want to see explicit controls for creating, editing, and deleting notes, so that the design accurately reflects all required user interactions.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the mockup `design/approved/20260721003552-mockup/mockup.html`, When I open the file, Then there must be a prominent control (e.g., FAB) for creating a new note.
Given a rendered note item, When the interface is viewed, Then it must display edit and delete action controls.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Reduce missing CRUD controls in note interface mockup from 3 to 0
